description: UK startup providing affordable occupational health services to SMEs through digital platform. Offers health assessments, absence management support, and wellness programs for small businesses.
business_model: B2B - Subscription and pay-per-use for SMEs
target_market: UK SMEs (10-250 employees) underserved by traditional OH providers

varden_fit.rationale: Direct competitor in UK SME segment - acquisition target for UK market expansion
